title: pouzolzia zeylanica
intro: Pouzolzia zeylanica, also known as the 'Wild Banyan', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and itching. Pouzolzia zeylanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical applications, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
